MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF THE PACIFIC RIM TRADERS, LLC'S NOTICE OF CONTINUED HEARING ON APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

No appearances. This matter is off calendar. Duplicate entry. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Oct-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF THE PACIFIC RIM TRADERS, LLC'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Oct-09-2013 Continued To Oct-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF THE PACIFIC RIM TRADERS, LLC'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS Continued to October 25, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 9, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
